creator: aenima+fbsdbug@xs4all.nl
text:
It seems that this bug is affecting my system now, too.

In my case it regards a system where a recent Xen from xen-unstable.hg
is installed on top of a Linux 3.4 kernel. Then I installed FreeBSD 9
amd64 from iso as a domU, follwed by compiling world and kernel
from STABLE.

Whereas the GENERIC kernel allows me to use the keyboard over Xen's
VNC, XENHVM does not. I have used exactly the same installation on
other systems, the most recent working one dates to May 25th. On those
systems I don't have the same issues.

The only difference in the XENHVM kernel config is
MODULES_OVERRIDE="opensolaris zfs". I haven't tried to build a GENERIC
kernel yet.

I'm open to further testing but I'll need to be told what to do. :)

Mark
